title: Frontend Engineer Intern
description: Work with our frontend team to build interactive UI components for a learning platform. You'll collaborate with designers and engineers to deliver responsive web experiences.
requirements: Basic understanding of React and JavaScript

title: Junior Backend Developer
description: Build scalable API services and work with cloud databases. Ideal for developers with Node.js experience and a passion for building backend systems.
requirements: Familiarity with MongoDB or similar NoSQL databases

title: Product Design Intern
description: Assist in designing product interfaces and user experiences for our mobile and web applications. This role is perfect for creative students with a strong design portfolio.
requirements: Familiarity with Figma or Adobe XD
Basic understanding of UX research methods

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze business metrics, build dashboards, and help translate data into product decisions. Strong Excel and SQL skills are required.
requirements: Ability to interpret and present analytical findings

title: React Developer
description: Develop and maintain React-based web applications with a focus on performance and accessibility.
requirements: Strong knowledge of React and hooks
Understanding of frontend build tools and testing
